nodes.name: .env
nodes.summary: CI environment file setting the `BUILD_ENV_VERSION` variable that pins the CI Docker image version used by Buildkite pipelines.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Brief CI workflow documentation describing how the Buildkite CI pipeline is structured and noting the sqlsmith differential testing approach.

nodes.name: build-ci-image.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that builds the CI Docker image used by Buildkite, tagging it with the version from `ci/.env` and pushing it to the container registry.

nodes.name: license-header.txt
nodes.summary: Apache-2.0 license header template text used by the license header checker and fixer tools to stamp source files.

nodes.name: risedev-components.ci.benchmark.env
nodes.summary: CI environment config for benchmark runs, enabling MinIO storage, release-profile builds, and Prometheus/Grafana monitoring while disabling telemetry.

nodes.name: risedev-components.ci.env
nodes.summary: Base CI environment config enabling MinIO storage and disabling telemetry for standard CI test runs.

nodes.name: risedev-components.ci.iceberg.env
nodes.summary: CI environment config for Iceberg test runs, enabling MinIO and the Lakekeeper catalog service alongside standard settings.

nodes.name: risedev-components.ci.monitoring.env
nodes.summary: CI environment config for monitoring test runs, enabling MinIO, Prometheus, and Grafana alongside standard settings.

nodes.name: risedev-components.ci.source.env
nodes.summary: CI environment config for source connector test runs, enabling MinIO storage and disabling telemetry.
